steps.title: Explain the changed appearance
steps.content: The student wants the reason the Pleiades looks different now than it did to ancient cultures. The notes provide that reason: two stars moved so close together that they now appear as one.

steps.title: Reject incomplete uses
steps.content: Choice A gives only cultural descriptions. Choice B states the change but not the cause. Choice D gives the close-together detail but does not clearly explain the shift from ancient descriptions to today's appearance. The remaining choice gives the cause over time. The answer is C.
